faq.q: How do I create an account?
faq.a: Visit our web app and click 'Sign Up'. Follow the simple registration process to get started.

faq.q: Are your products covered by insurance?
faq.a: Some products may be eligible for insurance coverage. Contact us for specific details.
We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee on all products. Contact us for refund requests.

faq.q: How do I join a support group?
faq.a: Visit the Services page to see upcoming programs and register for groups that interest you.
Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption and comply with all healthcare data protection regulations.

faq.q: When will the mobile app be available?
faq.a: The mobile app is coming soon! Sign up on the Application page to be notified at launch.
